race.comment: SAPPHIRE REIGN (4) is in top form, most recently recording a win by a head over 1000m at Sunshine Coast to make it two in a row. Should park just off the speed and will prove tough to beat. KIRKSVILLE (3) scored at his most recent appearance, getting home by a nose over 1000m at Toowoomba. That continued the very strong form this campaign, with two wins from three runs. Rates among the leading players again. HEY DAISY (7) hasn't made an impression lately despite market confidence. Last start could only manage ninth over 1000m at Eagle Farm. Where there's smoke there's fire and can improve sharply without surprising. VORKUTA (2) is usually thereabouts and is a must for the multiples.
